usage: addTSV [-help] [-noRouteBlkg] {[-frontBump <string>] [-backBump <string>] [-tsvViaName <string>]} [-frontBump <string> [-loc_type {geometry_center|cell_center} -prefix <string>] [-stackViaUnderBump <string>]] [-backBump <string>  [-loc_type {geometry_center|cell_center} -prefix <string>]] [-tsvViaName <string> [-noPlaceBlkg  | -spacing <float>] [[[-tsvFeedthru {x y} [-stackViaTopLayer <string>]] | [-stripeNet <string> -stripeLayer <string>]] | [-stackViaName <string> [[-stackViaMarkerLayer <string>] [-stack_via_array <arraySizePairList> -stack_via_pitch <pitchSizePairList>]]]]] {[-lowerLeftLoc {x y}] [-relative_bump_cell <string> | -relative_selected_bump ]} {[-pitchxy {x y}] [-relative_bump_cell <string> | -relative_selected_bump ]} {[-upperRightLoc {x y} | -numxy {x y}] [-relative_bump_cell <string> | -relative_selected_bump ]} [{-relative_bump_cell <string> | -relative_selected_bump } [-relative_min_pitch <float>] [-relative_offset {x y}] [-relative_bump_type {signal power ground}]] [-perim <integer>] [-stagger ]

options.name: -loc_type
options.description: Specify the location type for bump creation

options.name: -numxy
options.description: x and y size of TSV array

options.name: -prefix
options.description: add prefix name for bump during bump creation and bump mapping

options.name: -relative_bump_cell
options.description: specify the relative bump cell, TSV or bumps are created by default at the geometry center of bumps with specified bump cell

options.name: -relative_bump_type
options.description: {signal power ground} Specify the relative bump type, TSV or bumps are created by default at the geometry center of bumps with specified bump type

options.name: -relative_min_pitch
options.description: Specify min pitch between the created bumps/TSVs. The pitch between all the created bumps/TSV should be larger than specified min pitch

options.name: -relative_offset
options.description: Specify the offset of created bump/TSV location compared with the relative bump. The geometry center of the created bump/TSV is the geometry center of the relative bumps plus the offset

options.name: -relative_selected_bump
options.description: specify the relative selected bump, TSV or bumps are created by default at the geometry center of selected bumps

options.name: -spacing
options.description: spacing between TSV cut and ajacent cell

options.name: -stackViaTopLayer
options.description: top metal layer for stacked via

options.name: -stackViaUnderBump
options.description: under front bump stack via name

options.name: -stack_via_array
options.description: specify the number of columns and rows

options.name: -stack_via_pitch
options.description: specify the pitch_x and pitch_y of stackVia

options.name: -stripeLayer
options.description: stripe LEF layer name or layer number (-1 for backside metal1, 1 for Metal1, etc)
